event_description: I do not have reliable, specific knowledge of Darling Ingredients Inc. (DAR) having announced an accounting restatement, an Item 4.02 non-reliance determination, a material financial-reporting misstatement, an SEC accounting investigation, or a finance-executive departure tied to financial-reporting issues. Nothing of this nature stands out in my training data for this company. This is not a confirmation that no such event occurred—only that I cannot recall one with confidence.
